baseline.reason: Correctly identifies the CWE-401 memory leak root cause: missing av_free(param) at the line-449 error return in param_parse. However, includes substantial unsupported speculation about a caller call chain (iamf_read_header, ff_iamfdec_read_descriptors, etc.) that does not exist in this self-contained fragment, inventing details from a different test case.

vastdb.reason: Accurately identifies the CWE-401 memory leak root cause, pinpoints allocation at line 407 and leak at line 449, correctly notes that other error paths (lines 442, 462, 476) do call av_free(param) while this one does not. Honestly acknowledges inability to prove a full caller stack rather than inventing one. Clean, evidence-grounded explanation with no unsupported speculation.
